github.description: GitHub operations — PRs, issues, repos, code search

context7.description: Live documentation lookup for NestJS, FastAPI, Terraform, K8s, SQLAlchemy, TypeORM, Prisma

sequential-thinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning for architecture decisions and complex debugging

firecrawl.description: Web research for AWS docs, Terraform registry, K8s docs, framework changelogs

memory.description: Persistent memory for infrastructure decisions, architecture choices, and cross-session context

_usage.install: Copy desired servers into ~/.claude.json under mcpServers
_usage.stack: Optimized for NestJS + FastAPI + Terraform + AWS + K8s workflow
_usage.context_warning: 5 servers kept lean — per ECC longform guide, keep under 10 enabled / 80 tools to preserve context window
_usage.daily_enable: Enable github + context7 always. Enable others as needed per session.
